title: Fastbuild
description: You can place structure blocks and by right clicking them they will automatically get  built!
body:
Hello everyone! 
 
Huge Villa building doesn't have an interior because it is too large and I think you'll want to decorate it yourself.

Fast Build mod is a instant-build mod which you can just right click on a building block and wait for the building to appear in front of you. For now, there are 6 blocks.
